scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only; the full MailerLite API surface (single-subscriber CRUD, webhooks, forms, fields, campaign content) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /subscribers is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/webhooks is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures

/forms/{type} is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
/fields is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
